scripts.db:seed: docker compose exec -T -w /app/apps/auth-service auth-service ./node_modules/.bin/tsx src/infrastructure/db/seed.ts && docker compose exec -T -w /app/apps/catalog-service catalog-service ./node_modules/.bin/tsx src/infrastructure/db/seed.ts
scripts.db:generate: corepack pnpm --filter @hathor/auth-service db:generate && corepack pnpm --filter @hathor/catalog-service db:generate && corepack pnpm --filter @hathor/commerce-service db:generate && corepack pnpm --filter @hathor/library-service db:generate
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec -T -w /app/apps/auth-service auth-service ./node_modules/.bin/tsx src/infrastructure/db/migrate.ts && docker compose exec -T -w /app/apps/catalog-service catalog-service ./node_modules/.bin/tsx src/infrastructure/db/migrate.ts && docker compose exec -T -w /app/apps/commerce-service commerce-service ./node_modules/.bin/tsx src/infrastructure/db/migrate.ts && docker compose exec -T -w /app/apps/library-service library-service ./node_modules/.bin/tsx src/infrastructure/db/migrate.ts
